# Kaizen Infotech Solutions

> Kaizen Infotech Solutions is an ISO 9001:2015-certified software company based in Thane, Maharashtra, India. We build custom software, mobile apps, event registration & management systems, enterprise web portals, and digital marketing solutions for enterprises, government bodies, and global communities.

## About

- [About Kaizen Infotech](https://kaizeninfotech.com/about): Our story, values, and delivery process. We take a business-first approach — understanding operational workflows before designing technology around them.
- Notable scale: a digital ecosystem for Rotary International serving 4,500+ clubs and over 1.8 lakh Rotarians across Zones 4–7 in India, plus platforms trusted by public institutions.

## Services

- [Custom Software Development](https://kaizeninfotech.com/services/custom-software-development): Tailor-made enterprise software, business process automation, custom ERP/MIS, dashboards, and API integrations.
- [Mobile App Development](https://kaizeninfotech.com/services/mobile-app-development): Native Android and iOS apps for member engagement, enterprise mobility, and field-force management.
- [Event Registration & Management Systems](https://kaizeninfotech.com/services/event-registration-management): End-to-end event registration, ticketing, and delegate management platforms.
- [Enterprise Web Portals](https://kaizeninfotech.com/services/enterprise-web-portals): Scalable, secure web portals for large organisations and communities.
- [Digital Marketing](https://kaizeninfotech.com/services/digital-marketing-services): SEO, content, and campaign services that grow reach and engagement.

## Work

- [Case Studies](https://kaizeninfotech.com/work): Real-world digital platforms delivered for government organisations, enterprises, healthcare providers, and global communities — each with a defined problem, solution, and measurable outcome.

## Blog

- [Blog](https://kaizeninfotech.com/blog): Articles on custom software, mobile apps, digital transformation, and technology trends.

## Careers

- [Careers](https://kaizeninfotech.com/careers): Build platforms used by government organisations and global communities; team culture, benefits, and opportunities to grow.
